title: Figure 3 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3 Amphisphaeria planibasalis (MFLU 26-0119, holotype). a. Substrate; b, c. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); d, e. Vertical sections through ascomata; f. Peridium; g. Paraphyses; h–j. Asci; k. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; l–t. Ascospores (l in Indian ink). Scale bars: 1 cm (a); 500 μm (b, c); 200 μm (d, e); 20 μm (h–j); 10 μm (f, g, k–t).
